executives.name: Ian Atkinson
executives.background: Mr. Atkinson was previously the President and CEO of Centerra Gold Inc. and has extensive experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: William Zisch
executives.background: Mr. Zisch has served as a director since 2020. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles at Newmont and Argonaut Gold.
